name: PER_GRADE_LADDERS_X
query: SELECT PGL.GRADE_LADDER_ID, PGL.EFFECTIVE_START_DATE, PGL.EFFECTIVE_END_DATE, PGL.BUSINESS_GROUP_ID, PGL.ACTION_OCCURRENCE_ID, PGL.GRADE_SET_ID, PGL.GRADE_TYPE, PGT.NAME, PGL.ACTIVE_STATUS, PGL.ATTRIBUTE_CATEGORY, PGL.ATTRIBUTE1, PGL.ATTRIBUTE2, PGL.ATTRIBUTE3, PGL.ATTRIBUTE4, PGL.ATTRIBUTE5, PGL.ATTRIBUTE6, PGL.ATTRIBUTE7, PGL.ATTRIBUTE8, PGL.ATTRIBUTE9, PGL.ATTRIBUTE10, PGL.ATTRIBUTE11, PGL.ATTRIBUTE12, PGL.ATTRIBUTE13, PGL.ATTRIBUTE14, PGL.ATTRIBUTE15, PGL.ATTRIBUTE16, PGL.ATTRIBUTE17, PGL.ATTRIBUTE18, PGL.ATTRIBUTE19, PGL.ATTRIBUTE20, PGL.ATTRIBUTE21, PGL.ATTRIBUTE22, PGL.ATTRIBUTE23, PGL.ATTRIBUTE24, PGL.ATTRIBUTE25, PGL.ATTRIBUTE26, PGL.ATTRIBUTE27, PGL.ATTRIBUTE28, PGL.ATTRIBUTE29, PGL.ATTRIBUTE30, PGL.OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER, PGL.CREATED_BY, PGL.CREATION_DATE, PGL.LAST_UPDATED_BY, PGL.LAST_UPDATE_DATE, PGL.LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN, PGL.ATTRIBUTE_NUMBER1, PGL.ATTRIBUTE_NUMBER2, PGL.ATTRIBUTE_NUMBER3, PGL.ATTRIBUTE_NUMBER4, PGL.ATTRIBUTE_NUMBER5, PGL.ATTRIBUTE_NUMBER6, PGL.ATTRIBUTE_NUMBER7, PGL.ATTRIBUTE_NUMBER8, PGL.ATTRIBUTE_NUMBER9, PGL.ATTRIBUTE_NUMBER10, PGL.ATTRIBUTE_NUMBER11, PGL.ATTRIBUTE_NUMBER12, PGL.ATTRIBUTE_NUMBER13, PGL.ATTRIBUTE_NUMBER14, PGL.ATTRIBUTE_NUMBER15, PGL.ATTRIBUTE_NUMBER16, PGL.ATTRIBUTE_NUMBER17, PGL.ATTRIBUTE_NUMBER18, PGL.ATTRIBUTE_NUMBER19, PGL.ATTRIBUTE_NUMBER20, PGL.ATTRIBUTE_DATE1, PGL.ATTRIBUTE_DATE2, PGL.ATTRIBUTE_DATE3, PGL.ATTRIBUTE_DATE4, PGL.ATTRIBUTE_DATE5, PGL.ATTRIBUTE_DATE6, PGL.ATTRIBUTE_DATE7, PGL.ATTRIBUTE_DATE8, PGL.ATTRIBUTE_DATE9, PGL.ATTRIBUTE_DATE10, PGL.ATTRIBUTE_DATE11, PGL.ATTRIBUTE_DATE12, PGL.ATTRIBUTE_DATE13, PGL.ATTRIBUTE_DATE14, PGL.ATTRIBUTE_DATE15 FROM PER_GRADE_LADDERS_F PGL, PER_GRADE_LADDERS_F_TL PGT WHERE PGL.GRADE_LADDER_ID = PGT.GRADE_LADDER_ID AND PGL.EFFECTIVE_START_DATE = PGT.EFFECTIVE_START_DATE AND PGL.EFFECTIVE_END_DATE = PGT.EFFECTIVE_END_DATE AND PGT.LANGUAGE = SYS_CONTEXT('USERENV', 'LANG') AND TRUNC(sysdate) BETWEEN PGL.EFFECTIVE_START_DATE AND PGL.EFFECTIVE_END_DATE
